---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an error in documentation, broken links, or incorrect guidance
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the issue.

## Location

- **File/Page:** (e.g., `docs/controls/pillar-1-readiness/1.1-copilot-readiness-assessment.md`)
- **Section:** (e.g., "Setup & Configuration")

## Expected Behavior

What the documentation should say or how the link should work.

## Actual Behavior

What is currently incorrect.

## Additional Context

- Date verified:
- Microsoft Learn URL (if applicable):
- Admin portal version/date (if UI discrepancy):
